identity.name: Plan4Growth Academy
identity.mission: To elevate dental professionals through UK-accredited implantology education.

marketing_pages.description: Use asymmetric layouts. Avoid centering everything. Use whitespace heavily.
marketing_pages.hero_section: Split screen or Immersive Background with Text Overlay. Use 'Deep Navy' background for immediate premium feel.
marketing_pages.features_section: Bento Grid with mixed span sizes. Use 'Gold' for icons or key metrics.

dashboard_pages.description: Sidebar navigation (left). Top header for user profile. Main content area with card-based widgets.
dashboard_pages.cards: White background, thin border (slate-200), subtle shadow. Headers in Navy.

visual_enhancers.gradients: No full gradients. Use subtle radial glows of Navy or Gold in the background.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use a very subtle 'noise' texture on the Navy background to make it feel like paper/fabric.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or modal overlays. 'Crystal' style: backdrop-blur-xl + border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on pricing cards or key feature cards in Gold.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0A1628] hover:bg-[#D4B65D] font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(201,168,76,0.39)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A1628] text-[#0A1628] hover:bg-[#0A1628] hover:text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300

cards.marketing: bg-white p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 group
cards.dashboard: bg-white p-6 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#0A1628] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A1628] rounded-md px-4 py-3

hero_background.usage: Use with a heavy Navy overlay (opacity-90) for the hero background to create texture without distraction.

course_context.usage: Use in the 'Course Details' or 'About' section to show real-world application.

motion_guidelines.page_load: Fade in up (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0) with 0.5s duration.
motion_guidelines.hover_effects: Buttons lift (-2px). Cards scale slightly (1.02) or border color changes to Gold.
motion_guidelines.scroll: Use IntersectionObserver to trigger fade-ins for sections as they scroll into view.

accessibility_checklist: Ensure Navy text on White meets 4.5:1 ratio (Passes easily).
Ensure White text on Gold (#C9A84C) is CHECKED. It might fail. Use Navy text on Gold buttons for better contrast.
All images must have alt text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (primary: #0A1628, secondary: #C9A84C) and fonts.
3. SETUP ROUTING: Create the file structure for Public pages (Home, About, Courses, Contact) and Private pages (Dashboard, etc.).
4. AUTH LAYOUT: Create a specific layout for Login/Register that is split 50/50: Left side is a Testimonial/Hero Image slider (Navy bg), Right side is the Form (White bg).
5. DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Create a SidebarLayout component that persists across all /dashboard/* routes.
6. USE SHADCN: Use Shadcn UI for all interactive components (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Forms) but style them with the 'Royal Harley' theme (Navy borders/rings instead of black).
7. IMAGE USAGE: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. If you need more, use placeholders with descriptive alt text, or call image_selector_tool again.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Playfair Display'.
Do not use default shadcn radii. Use 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-sm' for a sharper, more professional look.
Avoid gradients on text unless it's a very subtle Gold shimmer on the main H1.
Center text ONLY in the Hero or specific 'Callout' sections. Default to Left Align for readability.
